decision.archive_summary: Active topic remains codex minor GC regression hardening for natural Chinese multi-turn topic shifts. Completed work so far: added harder Chinese multitopic return case to fixed live regressions, tightened guard logic so packaged guard cannot override shadow-guard veto, reran auto-eval, and reached green. Durable user guidance to preserve: expand harder GC-B-like natural Chinese multi-turn detour/return cases into fixed regression coverage, and avoid whitelist-style or hardcoded handling. Most intermediate status/test-confirmation turns are resolved snapshots and can leave the next-turn raw prompt.
decision.reasoning_summary: The current request is a direct continuation of the same active engineering task, so relation=continue. The next turn should still retain the immediately relevant raw context around the latest implementation state, especially the most recent continue + summary of general fixes. Older progress snapshots, confirmations, and test-run chatter are resolved and good eviction candidates. The user’s durable product requirements from t3 and t5 should survive as compact pins even if their raw turns leave the prompt.
